name: @promptlens/browser-extension
description: Veyr overlay for ChatGPT and Claude (Chrome MV3, zero-build).

scripts.build: echo 'No build step — load packages/browser-extension as an unpacked extension.'
scripts.package: node scripts/make-icons.js && rm -rf dist-zip && mkdir -p dist-zip && zip -r -X dist-zip/veyr-extension.zip manifest.json icons src -x '*.DS_Store'
